_meta.name: ALM A1 launch config — 14B r4 base resume + Φ-aware LoRA
_meta.rationale: 14B r4 LoRA base weights resume from R2 (data/params unchanged -> resume allowed). New LoRA scratch training with Φ-aware auxiliary loss. Wall 12h, budget $36 on single H100. feedback_no_resume_data_change satisfied: only LoRA adapter reinits, base resumes.

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.r4_adapter_resume_note: base weights reload from r4 latest step. LoRA adapter is scratch (new rank/alpha). Policy satisfied because base weights != data/params change.

lora.rationale: r64 alpha128 2:1 ratio, 7-module target (attn+MLP). Matches ALM-P4-2 holographic loss wiring in train_alm_14b.hexa.

phi_loss.note: HOLO_LOSS_COEF = 0.01 in train_alm_14b.hexa (ALM-P4-2). Auxiliary holographic loss MSE+MI integrated with main CE via train_alm_14b.hexa:517 loss_total path.

corpus.note: Same corpus as r4/r5/r6/r7/r8a so resume semantics hold. A1 does not change data.

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

pod.note: Pod must have bf16 capability (SM90/H100). launch_alm_a1.hexa refuses on CPU or A100/V100 pods.

blocks.requires_free: /workspace/ckpt_alm14b_phi_a1_* dir NOT in use by running process
